gaps: A way to filter fedcourts query by motion kind / docket-entry text rather than case topic — topic search for 'motion to correct' matched nothing, and the broad ca11 query surfaced only old merits-era cases irrelevant to a clerk-level no-action event
Motion-level (not case-level) base rates, e.g. grant rates by motion kind per circuit
helpful: Provisioned snapshot with full docket-entry descriptions (the forming entry itself carried the court's response)
notes: Snapshot alone was nearly sufficient for this cell: the event was formed from the docket entry that records the court's 'no action will be taken' response to the motion. Corpus query added little; statpack confirmed 'other' dominates ca11 resolved dispositions.
